<div class="sr-sec">一、基本行情概览</div>
<div class="sr-card"><div class="sr-mr"><span class="sr-ml">收盘价</span><span class="sr-mv">4093 人民币</span></div><div class="sr-mr"><span class="sr-ml">今日涨跌</span><span class="sr-mv" style="color:#388e3c">&#9660;0.32%</span></div><div class="sr-mr"><span class="sr-ml">开盘 / 昨收</span><span class="sr-mv">4111 / 0</span></div><div class="sr-mr"><span class="sr-ml">今日高 / 低</span><span class="sr-mv">4115 / 4070</span></div><div class="sr-mr"><span class="sr-ml">成交额</span><span class="sr-mv">+12343.96亿元</span></div><div class="sr-mr"><span class="sr-ml">换手率 / 量比</span><span class="sr-mv">1.40% / 1.18</span></div><div class="sr-mr"><span class="sr-ml">PE(TTM) / PB</span><span class="sr-mv">17.8倍 / —</span></div><div class="sr-mr"><span class="sr-ml">52周高 / 低</span><span class="sr-mv">4197 / 3278</span></div><div class="sr-mr"><span class="sr-ml">今日创52周新高</span><span class="sr-mv" style="color:#202124">否</span></div><div class="sr-mr"><span class="sr-ml">近20日涨跌</span><span class="sr-mv" style="color:#d32f2f">+4.11%</span></div><div class="sr-mr"><span class="sr-ml">近60日涨跌</span><span class="sr-mv" style="color:#388e3c">-0.50%</span></div></div>

<div class="sr-sec">三、技术面分析</div>
<div class="grid2"><div class="sr-card"><h2>均线系统</h2><table class="sr-tbl"><thead><tr><th>均线</th><th>数值</th><th>信号</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>MA5</td><td style="font-family:monospace">4084</td><td><span style="color:#d32f2f;font-weight:600">价格在上 +0.2%</span></td></tr><tr><td>MA10</td><td style="font-family:monospace">4050</td><td><span style="color:#d32f2f;font-weight:600">价格在上 +1.1%</span></td></tr><tr><td>MA20</td><td style="font-family:monospace">3986</td><td><span style="color:#d32f2f;font-weight:600">价格在上 +2.7%</span></td></tr><tr><td>MA30</td><td style="font-family:monospace">3991</td><td><span style="color:#d32f2f;font-weight:600">价格在上 +2.6%</span></td></tr><tr><td>MA60</td><td style="font-family:monospace">4055</td><td><span style="color:#d32f2f;font-weight:600">价格在上 +1.0%</span></td></tr></tbody></table></div><div class="sr-card"><h2>主要技术指标</h2><table class="sr-tbl"><thead><tr><th>指标</th><th>数值</th><th>信号</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>MACD(DIF/DEA)</td><td style="font-family:monospace">21.88 / 1.63</td><td><span style="color:#d32f2f;font-weight:600">金叉，强势上行</span></td></tr><tr><td>KDJ(K/D/J)</td><td style="font-family:monospace">93.2 / 93.1 / 93.6</td><td><span style="color:#d32f2f;font-weight:600">超买，高位注意</span></td></tr><tr><td>RSI(6)</td><td style="font-family:monospace">72.30</td><td><span style="color:#d32f2f;font-weight:600">超买，注意</span></td></tr><tr><td>布林带(上/中/下)</td><td style="font-family:monospace">0 / 0 / 0</td><td><span style="color:#d32f2f;font-weight:600">远超上轨，超买</span></td></tr></tbody></table></div></div>
<div class="sr-card"><div class="sr-hbox sr-hbox-blue" style="margin:0;font-size:12px">技术面小结：均线系统多头排列。RSI(6)=72（偏强），KDJ-J=94，MACD金叉向上。当前价高于MA20(3986)，趋势偏强，短线注意超买回调。</div></div>

</div>

</div>



<div class="sr-sec">八、未来走势预估</div><div class="sr-card"><div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:12px"><div style="background:#fff8e1;border-radius:8px;padding:14px;border-left:4px solid #ffb300"><div style="font-size:12px;color:#e65100;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px">短期（1-5天）</div><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:800;color:#202124;margin-bottom:8px">短期承压</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:#5f6368;line-height:1.7">短期技术面偏弱，关注量价配合情况。MA5(4084)为近期重要支撑。</div></div><div style="background:#e8f5e9;border-radius:8px;padding:14px;border-left:4px solid #43a047"><div style="font-size:12px;color:#2e7d32;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px">中期（1个月）</div><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:800;color:#202124;margin-bottom:8px">回调后仍看多</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:#5f6368;line-height:1.7">若回调至MA5(4084)-MA10(4050)区间则是较好的中期买入机会，目标价参考4113元。</div></div><div style="background:#fce8e6;border-radius:8px;padding:14px;border-left:4px solid #ef5350"><div style="font-size:12px;color:#c62828;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px">长期（3-6个月）</div><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:800;color:#202124;margin-bottom:8px">关注基本面兑现</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:#5f6368;line-height:1.7">若业绩持续增长，估值有望得到支撑；若业绩不达预期，存在一定回调风险。结合行业趋势和竞争格局综合判断。</div></div></div></div>

<div class="sr-sec">九、综合投资建议</div>
<div class="sr-rec-watch">
<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;margin-bottom:16px">
<div class="sr-ring-wrap sr-ring-warn" style="flex-shrink:0"><div>
<div style="font-size:26px;font-weight:900;line-height:1">5.9</div><div style="font-size:10px">/ 10</div>
</div></div>
<div>
<div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:#f57c00">注意控仓，压力较大</div>
<div style="font-size:12px;color:#5f6368;margin-top:4px">综合评分基于：技术面 + 资金面 + 基本面 + 机构评级</div>
</div></div>
<div style="font-size:13px;color:#202124;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:14px">
<p>核心结论：注意控仓，压力较大。建议等待回调至¥3970区间建仓，止损¥3653，目标¥4113。</p>
</div>
<div class="sr-pt-grid"><div class="sr-pt-cell"><span class="sr-pt-label">当前价</span><span class="sr-pt-price" style="color:#f57c00">¥4093</span><span class="sr-pt-hint">当前位置</span></div><div class="sr-pt-cell"><span class="sr-pt-label">回调买入区间</span><span class="sr-pt-price" style="color:#1565c0">¥3970</span><span class="sr-pt-hint">BOLL下轨/MA5支撑区</span></div><div class="sr-pt-cell"><span class="sr-pt-label">强支撑区/止损</span><span class="sr-pt-price" style="color:#ea4335">¥3653</span><span class="sr-pt-hint">MA20下方缓冲</span></div><div class="sr-pt-cell"><span class="sr-pt-label">中期目标</span><span class="sr-pt-price" style="color:#34a853">¥4113</span><span class="sr-pt-hint">近52周高位</span></div><div class="sr-pt-cell"><span class="sr-pt-label">长期目标</span><span class="sr-pt-price" style="color:#34a853">¥5321</span><span class="sr-pt-hint">趋势延续前提</span></div><div class="sr-pt-cell"><span class="sr-pt-label">止损价</span><span class="sr-pt-price" style="color:#ea4335">¥3653</span><span class="sr-pt-hint">跌破则离场</span></div></div>
